_comment: Slack App manifest for CCC (Claw Command Center). Import at https://api.slack.com/apps

display_information.name: Claw Command Center
display_information.description: CCC agent coordination hub — ask Rocky questions, check queue status, and route work.
display_information.long_description: Claw Command Center (CCC) is the coordination hub for the Rocky & Friends agent team. Use @Rocky to ask questions, get queue status, and route work items. Supports slash commands and direct messages.

slash_commands.description: Claw Command Center — queue, status, and AI queries
